reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify NYC high schools with a 100% 4-year graduation rate for the 2009 cohort.
2. From those schools, keep the ones that also had a 100% 4-year graduation rate for the 2010 cohort.
3. From the remaining schools, keep those with a female student percentage greater than 60% in the 2011-12 school year.
4. From the remaining schools, keep those with enrollment under 600 students in the 2013-14 school year.
5. For the remaining high school, determine the city where its namesake was born.
6. Using the city identified in step 5, determine the city's founding year.
original_final_question: In what year was the city founded where the person was born after whom the NYC high school is named that had a 4-year graduation rate of 100% for both the 2009 cohort (according to 2005-2015 graduation rates) AND the 2010 cohort (according to 2005-2019 graduation rates), had a female student percentage greater than 60% in 2011-12 according to the 2011-2016 demographic snapshot, AND had enrollment less than 600 students in 2013-14 according to the 2013-2018 demographic snapshot? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Graduation rates 2005-2015, 2009 cohort, 100% 4-year (June) rate -> {Eleanor Roosevelt, Young Women's Leadership, HS American Studies, Townsend Harris, Scholars' Academy}

Node 2: Graduation rates 2005-2019, 2010 cohort, 100% 4-year (June) rate -> {Baruch College Campus, Eleanor Roosevelt, Brooklyn College Academy, Townsend Harris, Scholars' Academy, Queens HS for the Sciences at York College}
Intersection(1,2) -> {Eleanor Roosevelt, Townsend Harris, Scholars' Academy}
HOP 2 (d=2 - nodes 3,4 intersection within hop 1 result):
Node 3: Demographic snapshot 2011-2016, 2011-12, female > 60% -> {Eleanor Roosevelt (67.5%), Townsend Harris (71.1%)}
Intersection(3,4) within hop 1 result -> {Eleanor Roosevelt High School}
HOP 3 (Wikipedia - node 5 identifies birthplace of namesake):
Node 5: Wikipedia Eleanor Roosevelt -> Born in Manhattan, New York City
HOP 4 (Wikipedia - node 6 finds city founding year):
Node 6: Wikipedia New York City -> Founded 1624
